block.header: taka ma no para ni kamu dumari masu sumyemutu kamu rwogi kamu rwomi no mikoto moti te sumyemima no mikoto pa toyo asi para no midu po no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapirake ku sirosi myese to ame no sita yosa si maturi si toki ni koto yosa si maturi si ama tu noritwo no putwo noritwo goto wo moti te mawosa ku kamu izanaki izanami no mikoto imose puta pasira totugi tamapi te kuni no ya swo kuni sima no ya swo sima wo umi tama pi ya po yorodu no kamwi tati wo umi tama pite mana oto gwo ni pomusubinokamwi wo umi tamapi te mi poto yaka ye te ipa gakuri masi te ywo nana ywo pi nanu ka wa wo na mi tama pi so wa ga nase no mikoto to mawosi tama pi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-NMZ-FRM,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP-OB1,PP-GEN,NP,1@皇親神漏義神漏美乃命持弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-NMZ-FRM,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,PP-TOP,NP,3@命波豐葦原乃水穗國乎安國止平久,*
IP-MAT,9@神伊佐奈伎伊佐奈美乃,*
IP-MAT,18@美保止被燒弖石隱坐弖,*
IP-MAT,19@夜七日晝七日吾乎奈見給比曾,*

sentence.transcription: taka ma no para ni kamu dumari masu

sentence.kanji: 皇親神漏義神漏美乃命持弖
sentence.transcription: sumyemutu kamu rwogi kamu rwomi no mikoto moti te
sumyemima no

sentence.kanji: 命波豐葦原乃水穗國乎安國止平久
sentence.transcription: mikoto pa toyo asi para no midu po no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapirake ku
sirosi myese to
ame no sita yosa si maturi si
toki ni koto yosa si maturi si
ama tu noritwo no
putwo noritwo goto wo moti te mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 神伊佐奈伎伊佐奈美乃
sentence.transcription: kamu izanaki izanami no
mikoto imose puta pasira totugi tamapi te
kuni no
ya swo kuni sima no
ya swo sima wo umi tama pi
ya po yorodu no
kamwi tati wo umi tama pite
mana oto gwo ni
pomusubinokamwi wo umi tamapi te

sentence.kanji: 美保止被燒弖石隱坐弖
sentence.transcription: mi poto yaka ye te ipa gakuri masi te

sentence.kanji: 夜七日晝七日吾乎奈見給比曾
sentence.transcription: ywo nana ywo pi nanu ka wa wo na mi tama pi so
wa ga nase no
mikoto to mawosi tama pi ki

block.header: ko no nanu ka ni pa tara zu te kakuri masu koto ayasi tote mi swonapa su toki ni pwi wo umi tamapite mi poto wo yaka ye masi ki

sentence.transcription: ko no nanu ka ni pa tara zu te
kakuri masu
koto ayasi tote mi swonapa su
toki ni pwi wo umi tamapite
mi poto wo yaka ye masi ki

block.header: kakaru toki ni wa ga nase no mikoto no wa wo mi tama pu na to mawosi si wo wa wo mi apatasi tama pi tu to mawosi tamapi te wa ga nase no mikoto pa upa tu kuni wo sirosi myesu besi wa pa simwo tu kuni wo sira sa mu to mawosi te ipa gakuri tamapi te yomi tu pira saka ni itari masi te omoposi myesa ku wa ga nase no mikoto no sirosi myesu upa tu kuni ni kokoro asi ki kwo wo umi oki te ki nu to nori tamapi te kapyeri masi te sara ni umi tamapu kwo midunokamwi pisago kapana paniyamapimye yo kusa no mono wo umi tamapi te ko no kokoro asi ki kwo no kokoro ara biru pa midu pisago paniyamapimye kapana wo moti te sidume matu re to koto wosipe satosi tamapi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ARG,4@吾乎見阿波多志給比津止申給弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ARG,C-IP,PP-SBJ,NP,6@命波上津國乎所知食保〈倍〉之吾波下津國乎所知牟止申弖石隱給弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,12@子乎生置弖來奴止宣弖返坐弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-OB1,18@波水匏埴山姫川菜乎持弖,*

sentence.transcription: kakaru
toki ni wa ga nase no
mikoto no wa wo mi tama pu na to
mawosi si wo

sentence.kanji: 吾乎見阿波多志給比津止申給弖
sentence.transcription: wa wo mi apatasi tama pi tu to mawosi tamapi te
wa ga nase no

sentence.kanji: 命波上津國乎所知食保〈倍〉之吾波下津國乎所知牟止申弖石隱給弖
sentence.transcription: mikoto pa upa tu kuni wo sirosi myesu besi wa pa simwo tu kuni wo sira sa mu to mawosi te ipa gakuri tamapi te
yomi tu pira saka ni itari masi te
omoposi myesa ku
wa ga nase no
mikoto no sirosi myesu
upa tu kuni ni kokoro asi ki

sentence.kanji: 子乎生置弖來奴止宣弖返坐弖
sentence.transcription: kwo wo umi oki te ki nu to nori tamapi te kapyeri masi te
sara ni umi tamapu

sentence.kanji: 子水神匏川菜埴山姫四種
sentence.transcription: kwo midunokamwi pisago kapana paniyamapimye yo kusa no
mono wo umi tamapi te
ko no kokoro asi ki
kwo no kokoro ara biru

sentence.kanji: 波水匏埴山姫川菜乎持弖
sentence.transcription: pa midu pisago paniyamapimye kapana wo moti te
sidume matu re to koto wosipe satosi tamapi ki

block.header: kore ni yori te tatapegoto wope maturaba sumyemima no mikadwo ni mi kokoro itipaya bi tama pazi to si te tate maturu mono pa akaru tape teru tape nigi tape ara tape itu iro no mono wo sonape maturi te awo mi no para ni sumu mono pa pata no piro mono pata no sa mono oki tu mo pa pye tu mo pa ni itaru made ni mi ki pa mika no pe taka siri mika no para mite narabe te nigi sine ara sine ni itaru made ni yoko yama no goto ku oki taka nasi te ama tu noritwo no putwo noritwo goto moti te tatapegoto wope matura ku to mawosu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@皇御孫乃朝庭爾御心一速比給波之止爲弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,9@物者鰭廣物鰭狹物奧津海菜邊津海菜爾至万弖爾,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,12@和稻荒稻爾至万弖爾如橫山,*

sentence.transcription: kore ni yori te
tatapegoto wope maturaba

sentence.kanji: 皇御孫乃朝庭爾御心一速比給波之止爲弖
sentence.transcription: sumyemima no mikadwo ni mi kokoro itipaya bi tama pazi to si te
tate maturu
mono pa akaru
tape teru
tape nigi tape ara tape itu iro no
mono wo sonape maturi te
awo mi no para ni sumu

sentence.kanji: 物者鰭廣物鰭狹物奧津海菜邊津海菜爾至万弖爾
sentence.transcription: mono pa pata no piro mono pata no sa mono oki tu mo pa pye tu mo pa ni itaru made ni
mi ki pa mika no pe taka siri
mika no para mite narabe te

sentence.kanji: 和稻荒稻爾至万弖爾如橫山
sentence.transcription: nigi sine ara sine ni itaru made ni yoko yama no goto ku
oki taka nasi te
ama tu noritwo no
putwo noritwo goto moti te
tatapegoto wope
matura ku to mawosu
